title: Operating Improvements: Margin Expansion & Revenue Initiatives
learning_objectives: Identify key operational improvement levers in PE: pricing, procurement, SG&A reduction, working capital
Model margin expansion through cost reduction initiatives
Calculate cash released from working capital improvements
Benchmark operational metrics against industry peers
Quantify EBITDA impact and equity return contribution from operations

blocks.fintech_hook: When 3G Capital acquired Kraft Foods in 2015 and merged it with Heinz, they implemented zero-based budgeting (ZBB) in year 1 — every cost item had to be re-justified from scratch rather than simply incremented from the prior year. Kraft Heinz's EBITDA margins expanded from 14% to 27% in 3 years. The value creation was entirely operational, not financial engineering.
blocks.explanation: PE value creation through operations: (1) Revenue growth initiatives — pricing power analysis (price increase with minimal volume loss), cross-sell/upsell, new customer segments, international expansion, (2) Margin expansion — procurement savings (buying at scale), headcount rationalization, shared services centers, zero-based budgeting, (3) Working capital improvement — DSO reduction (days sales outstanding), DIO reduction (inventory), DPO extension (stretching payables), (4) CapEx optimization — lease vs buy decisions, maintenance vs growth capex, (5) Organic vs M&A growth (add-on acquisitions at lower multiples than platform). Operational due diligence: how PE firms assess operational improvement opportunity before buying — benchmarking against industry peers on SG&A as % of revenue, gross margin, working capital days.

code_example.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# Manufacturing company operational model
# Year 0 baseline
revenue_y0 = 250  # $M
cogs_pct_y0 = 0.62  # 62% of revenue
sga_pct_y0 = 0.18  # 18% of revenue
dso = 45  # Days sales outstanding
dio = 60  # Days inventory outstanding
dpo = 30  # Days payable outstanding
tax_rate = 0.25

# Operational improvement initiatives
print("OPERATIONAL IMPROVEMENT MODEL - 3-YEAR PLAN")
print("="*70)
print(f"\nYear 0 Baseline:")
print(f"  Revenue: ${revenue_y0}M")
print(f"  COGS: {cogs_pct_y0:.0%} → ${revenue_y0 * cogs_pct_y0:.1f}M")
print(f"  SG&A: {sga_pct_y0:.0%} → ${revenue_y0 * sga_pct_y0:.1f}M")
print(f"  Gross Margin: {(1 - cogs_pct_y0):.0%}")
print(f"  EBITDA Margin: {(1 - cogs_pct_y0 - sga_pct_y0):.0%}")
print(f"\nWorking Capital Metrics:")
print(f"  DSO: {dso} days")
print(f"  DIO: {dio} days")
print(f"  DPO: {dpo} days")
print(f"  CCC (Cash Conversion Cycle): {dso + dio - dpo} days")

# Project 3-year improvements
years = [0, 1, 2, 3]
model = pd.DataFrame(index=years)

for year in years:
    # Revenue growth: +5% per year organic
    model.loc[year, 'Revenue'] = revenue_y0 * ((1.05) ** year)
    
    # COGS improvement path: 62% → 61% → 60% → 59% (procurement savings)
    if year == 0:
        cogs_pct = 0.62
    elif year == 1:
        cogs_pct = 0.61  # 100 bps savings in year 1
    elif year == 2:
        cogs_pct = 0.60  # Additional 100 bps in year 2
    else:
        cogs_pct = 0.59  # Additional 100 bps in year 3
    
    model.loc[year, 'COGS_Pct'] = cogs_pct
    model.loc[year, 'COGS'] = model.loc[year, 'Revenue'] * cogs_pct
    model.loc[year, 'Gross_Profit'] = model.loc[year, 'Revenue'] - model.loc[year, 'COGS']
    model.loc[year, 'Gross_Margin_Pct'] = model.loc[year, 'Gross_Profit'] / model.loc[year, 'Revenue']
    
    # SG&A reduction: 18% → 16% by year 1 (shared services, headcount optimization)
    if year == 0:
        sga_pct = 0.18
    elif year == 1:
        sga_pct = 0.16  # 200 bps reduction from shared services
    else:
        sga_pct = 0.15  # Additional 100 bps in year 2
    
    model.loc[year, 'SGA_Pct'] = sga_pct
    model.loc[year, 'SGA'] = model.loc[year, 'Revenue'] * sga_pct
    
    # EBITDA (before D&A, interest, taxes)
    model.loc[year, 'EBITDA'] = model.loc[year, 'Gross_Profit'] - model.loc[year, 'SGA']
    model.loc[year, 'EBITDA_Margin_Pct'] = model.loc[year, 'EBITDA'] / model.loc[year, 'Revenue']
    
    # Working capital improvements
    if year == 0:
        wc_dso = dso
        wc_dio = dio
        wc_dpo = dpo
    elif year == 1:
        wc_dso = 40  # DSO reduction through faster collections
        wc_dio = 55  # DIO reduction through better inventory management
        wc_dpo = 32  # DPO extension by negotiating longer terms
    else:
        wc_dso = 35  # Further improvements
        wc_dio = 50
        wc_dpo = 35
    
    model.loc[year, 'DSO'] = wc_dso
    model.loc[year, 'DIO'] = wc_dio
    model.loc[year, 'DPO'] = wc_dpo
    model.loc[year, 'CCC'] = wc_dso + wc_dio - wc_dpo
    
    # Working capital in dollars
    model.loc[year, 'AR'] = (model.loc[year, 'Revenue'] / 365) * wc_dso
    model.loc[year, 'Inventory'] = (model.loc[year, 'COGS'] / 365) * wc_dio
    model.loc[year, 'AP'] = (model.loc[year, 'COGS'] / 365) * wc_dpo
    model.loc[year, 'NWC'] = model.loc[year, 'AR'] + model.loc[year, 'Inventory'] - model.loc[year, 'AP']

print("\n" + "="*70)
print("P&L IMPACT ($ Millions):")
print(model[['Revenue', 'COGS', 'Gross_Profit', 'SGA', 'EBITDA', 'EBITDA_Margin_Pct']].round(1))

print("\n" + "="*70)
print("OPERATIONAL METRICS:")
print(model[['Gross_Margin_Pct', 'SGA_Pct', 'EBITDA_Margin_Pct']].round(1))

print("\n" + "="*70)
print("WORKING CAPITAL METRICS (Days):")
print(model[['DSO', 'DIO', 'DPO', 'CCC']].round(0))

print("\n" + "="*70)
print("WORKING CAPITAL IMPACT ($M):")
print(model[['AR', 'Inventory', 'AP', 'NWC']].round(1))

# Calculate cash released
print("\n" + "="*70)
print("CASH RELEASED FROM WORKING CAPITAL IMPROVEMENTS:")
cash_released_y1 = model.loc[0, 'NWC'] - model.loc[1, 'NWC']
cash_released_y2 = model.loc[1, 'NWC'] - model.loc[2, 'NWC']
cash_released_y3 = model.loc[2, 'NWC'] - model.loc[3, 'NWC']
total_cash_released = cash_released_y1 + cash_released_y2 + cash_released_y3

print(f"Year 1 cash released: ${cash_released_y1:.1f}M")
print(f"Year 2 cash released: ${cash_released_y2:.1f}M")
print(f"Year 3 cash released: ${cash_released_y3:.1f}M")
print(f"Total 3-year cash released: ${total_cash_released:.1f}M")
print(f"\nThis cash can be used to reduce net debt, improving leverage and equity value.")

# EBITDA improvement attribution
print("\n" + "="*70)
print("EBITDA IMPROVEMENT ATTRIBUTION:")
print(f"\nYear 0 EBITDA: ${model.loc[0, 'EBITDA']:.1f}M ({model.loc[0, 'EBITDA_Margin_Pct']:.1%})")
print(f"Year 3 EBITDA: ${model.loc[3, 'EBITDA']:.1f}M ({model.loc[3, 'EBITDA_Margin_Pct']:.1%})")
print(f"\nEBITDA Growth: ${model.loc[3, 'EBITDA'] - model.loc[0, 'EBITDA']:.1f}M")

# Decompose EBITDA growth
ebitda_growth_organic = (model.loc[3, 'Revenue'] - model.loc[0, 'Revenue']) * model.loc[0, 'EBITDA_Margin_Pct']
ebitda_growth_margin = model.loc[3, 'Revenue'] * (model.loc[3, 'EBITDA_Margin_Pct'] - model.loc[0, 'EBITDA_Margin_Pct'])

print(f"\nBreakdown:")
print(f"  From organic revenue growth (5% CAGR): ${ebitda_growth_organic:.1f}M")
print(f"  From margin expansion (12% → 20%): ${ebitda_growth_margin:.1f}M")
print(f"  Total: ${ebitda_growth_organic + ebitda_growth_margin:.1f}M")

blocks.scenario: The 100-day value creation plan for a newly acquired food & beverage company. EBITDA margins are 12% versus the 19% industry median. The operations team has 90 days to identify and begin implementing the initiatives that will close this gap without destroying revenue.
constraints: No plant closures or material headcount reductions in first 90 days (labor agreements)
Maintain revenue flat (no loss of key customers due to operational disruption)
Identify $5M+ in annual run-rate savings by day 90 that are documentable and binding

stakeholder_pressures.pressure: Needs evidence of operational value-creation thesis working; wants 500+ bps margin expansion by year 2 to justify purchase price and hit equity return targets
Concerned about 3G's reputation for aggressive cost-cutting; worried about losing key talent; want reassurance on job security
Want to see documented savings and path to covenant compliance; concerned about execution risk on operational improvements

blocks.intro: You are the operating partner at 3G Capital tasked with executing a 100-day value creation plan on a newly acquired F&B company. The company is operating at 12% EBITDA margins while the industry median is 19%. Your job is to identify the root causes of margin underperformance, design initiatives to close the gap, and present a binding plan to close the 700 bps margin gap.

steps.instruction: Benchmark the company against industry and identify the specific drivers of margin underperformance. Calculate the EBITDA impact if the company matched the industry median on COGS % and SG&A %. How much incremental EBITDA would be unlocked? Show the waterfall.
steps.code:
import pandas as pd

# Current state
revenue = 800
cogs_pct_current = 0.58
sga_pct_current = 0.30
ebitda_current = 96
ebitda_margin_current = ebitda_current / revenue

# Industry benchmarks
cogs_pct_industry = 0.54
sga_pct_industry = 0.27

# Calculate opportunity
print("MARGIN GAP ANALYSIS - F&B COMPANY")
print("="*70)
print(f"\nCurrent Performance:")
print(f"  Revenue: ${revenue}M")
print(f"  COGS: {cogs_pct_current:.0%} → ${revenue * cogs_pct_current:.0f}M")
print(f"  SG&A: {sga_pct_current:.0%} → ${revenue * sga_pct_current:.0f}M")
print(f"  EBITDA: ${ebitda_current}M ({ebitda_margin_current:.0%})")

print(f"\nIndustry Benchmarks:")
print(f"  COGS: {cogs_pct_industry:.0%} (better by {(cogs_pct_current - cogs_pct_industry):.0%})")
print(f"  SG&A: {sga_pct_industry:.0%} (better by {(sga_pct_current - sga_pct_industry):.0%})")

# Calculate improvements
print(f"\nOPPORTUNITY SIZING:")

# COGS improvement
cogs_improvement = revenue * (cogs_pct_current - cogs_pct_industry)
print(f"\n1. COGS Reduction Opportunity:")
print(f"   Current: {cogs_pct_current:.0%} × ${revenue}M = ${revenue * cogs_pct_current:.0f}M")
print(f"   Industry: {cogs_pct_industry:.0%} × ${revenue}M = ${revenue * cogs_pct_industry:.0f}M")
print(f"   Potential Savings: ${cogs_improvement:.0f}M (400 bps)")
print(f"   Drivers: procurement consolidation, SKU rationalization, supplier negotiations")

# SG&A improvement
sga_improvement = revenue * (sga_pct_current - sga_pct_industry)
print(f"\n2. SG&A Reduction Opportunity:")
print(f"   Current: {sga_pct_current:.0%} × ${revenue}M = ${revenue * sga_pct_current:.0f}M")
print(f"   Industry: {sga_pct_industry:.0%} × ${revenue}M = ${revenue * sga_pct_industry:.0f}M")
print(f"   Potential Savings: ${sga_improvement:.0f}M (300 bps)")
print(f"   Drivers: shared services, indirect spend optimization, overhead reduction")

# Total improvement
total_improvement = cogs_improvement + sga_improvement
ebitda_target = ebitda_current + total_improvement
ebitda_margin_target = ebitda_target / revenue

print(f"\n" + "="*70)
print(f"EBITDA IMPROVEMENT WATERFALL:")
print(f"  Current EBITDA: ${ebitda_current:.0f}M ({ebitda_margin_current:.0%})")
print(f"  + COGS savings: ${cogs_improvement:.0f}M")
print(f"  + SG&A savings: ${sga_improvement:.0f}M")
print(f"  = Target EBITDA: ${ebitda_target:.0f}M ({ebitda_margin_target:.0%})")
print(f"\nMargin Expansion: {(ebitda_margin_target - ebitda_margin_current):.0%} (from 12% to 19%)")

print(f"\n" + "="*70)
print(f"VALUE IMPACT:")
print(f"  Exit multiple assumption: 10x EBITDA")
print(f"  Current EV: ${ebitda_current * 10:.0f}M")
print(f"  Target EV: ${ebitda_target * 10:.0f}M")
print(f"  EV uplift: ${(ebitda_target - ebitda_current) * 10:.0f}M")
print(f"\nThis demonstrates the value creation thesis to lenders and sponsor.")
steps.output:
MARGIN GAP ANALYSIS - F&B COMPANY
======================================================================

Current Performance:
  Revenue: $800M
  COGS: 58% → $464M
  SG&A: 30% → $240M
  EBITDA: $96M (12%)

Industry Benchmarks:
  COGS: 54% (better by 4%)
  SG&A: 27% (better by 3%)

OPPORTUNITY SIZING:

1. COGS Reduction Opportunity:
   Current: 58% × $800M = $464M
   Industry: 54% × $800M = $432M
   Potential Savings: $32M (400 bps)
   Drivers: procurement consolidation, SKU rationalization, supplier negotiations

2. SG&A Reduction Opportunity:
   Current: 30% × $800M = $240M
   Industry: 27% × $800M = $216M
   Potential Savings: $24M (300 bps)
   Drivers: shared services, indirect spend optimization, overhead reduction

======================================================================
EBITDA IMPROVEMENT WATERFALL:
  Current EBITDA: $96M (12%)
  + COGS savings: $32M
  + SG&A savings: $24M
  = Target EBITDA: $152M (19%)

Margin Expansion: 7% (from 12% to 19%)

======================================================================
VALUE IMPACT:
  Exit multiple assumption: 10x EBITDA
  Current EV: $960M
  Target EV: $1,520M
  EV uplift: $560M

This demonstrates the value creation thesis to lenders and sponsor.

steps.instruction: Design a 90-day action plan with specific, binding cost-reduction initiatives. Allocate the $56M annual EBITDA opportunity ($32M COGS + $24M SG&A) across concrete initiatives with quantified savings. Each initiative should have an implementation timeline, owner, and measurable KPI.
steps.code:
import pandas as pd

# 100-day value creation plan
initiatives = [
    {
        'Initiative': 'Procurement Consolidation',
        'Category': 'COGS',
        'Description': 'Consolidate supplier base, renegotiate contracts at scale',
        'Year_1_Savings': 12,
        'Timeline': '0-60 days',
        'Owner': 'VP Procurement',
        'KPI': '15% reduction in supplier count, 3-5% price reduction'
    },
    {
        'Initiative': 'SKU Rationalization',
        'Category': 'COGS',
        'Description': 'Eliminate low-margin SKUs, consolidate variants',
        'Year_1_Savings': 8,
        'Timeline': '30-90 days',
        'Owner': 'VP Operations',
        'KPI': 'Reduce SKU count 20%, maintain 95% revenue'
    },
    {
        'Initiative': 'Logistics/Transportation Optimization',
        'Category': 'COGS',
        'Description': 'Optimize routes, consolidate shipments, renegotiate freight rates',
        'Year_1_Savings': 6,
        'Timeline': '0-45 days',
        'Owner': 'VP Supply Chain',
        'KPI': '5-7% reduction in delivery costs per unit'
    },
    {
        'Initiative': 'Shared Services Center',
        'Category': 'SG&A',
        'Description': 'Move finance, HR, IT support to shared services (offshore)',
        'Year_1_Savings': 10,
        'Timeline': '30-90 days (planning), 90+ days (execution)',
        'Owner': 'CFO / VP HR',
        'KPI': 'Identify 25-30 FTE for relocation, 40% cost savings on those roles'
    },
    {
        'Initiative': 'Headquarters Overhead Reduction',
        'Category': 'SG&A',
        'Description': 'Reduce consulting spend, eliminate non-essential functions, consolidate offices',
        'Year_1_Savings': 6,
        'Timeline': '0-90 days',
        'Owner': 'Chief Transformation Officer',
        'KPI': '15% reduction in corporate G&A ($240M base)'
    },
    {
        'Initiative': 'Indirect Spend Management',
        'Category': 'SG&A',
        'Description': 'Rebid telecom, real estate, insurance, IT vendors; eliminate waste',
        'Year_1_Savings': 5,
        'Timeline': '45-90 days',
        'Owner': 'VP Indirect Procurement',
        'KPI': '10-15% reduction in each category without service disruption'
    },
    {
        'Initiative': 'Working Capital Optimization',
        'Category': 'Cash Impact',
        'Description': 'Accelerate AR collections, improve inventory turns, extend DPO',
        'Year_1_Savings': 0,  # No P&L impact, but cash release
        'Year_1_Cash': 8,
        'Timeline': '0-90 days',
        'Owner': 'VP Finance',
        'KPI': 'Release $8M cash, reduce DSO 5 days, improve DIO 10 days'
    }
]

df = pd.DataFrame(initiatives)

print("100-DAY VALUE CREATION PLAN")
print("="*100)
print(f"\nTotal Annual EBITDA Opportunity: ${df['Year_1_Savings'].sum()}M (excluding WC)")
print(f"Total Cash Release (Working Capital): ${df.iloc[6]['Year_1_Cash']}M")
print(f"\nDetailed Initiative Breakdown:")
print("\n")

for idx, row in df.iterrows():
    print(f"{idx+1}. {row['Initiative'].upper()}")
    print(f"   Category: {row['Category']}")
    print(f"   Description: {row['Description']}")
    if 'Year_1_Savings' in row and row['Year_1_Savings'] > 0:
        print(f"   Annual Savings: ${row['Year_1_Savings']}M")
    if 'Year_1_Cash' in row and pd.notna(row['Year_1_Cash']) and row['Year_1_Cash'] > 0:
        print(f"   Cash Release: ${row['Year_1_Cash']}M")
    print(f"   Timeline: {row['Timeline']}")
    print(f"   Owner: {row['Owner']}")
    print(f"   Success Metric: {row['KPI']}")
    print()

print("="*100)
print("\nSUMMARY: 100-DAY PLAN")
print(f"  COGS reductions: ${df[df['Category']=='COGS']['Year_1_Savings'].sum()}M")
print(f"  SG&A reductions: ${df[df['Category']=='SG&A']['Year_1_Savings'].sum()}M")
print(f"  Working capital cash release: ${df.iloc[6]['Year_1_Cash']}M")
print(f"  Total 3-year EBITDA impact (assuming continued initiatives): $56-60M")
print(f"\nThis plan is binding and tracked weekly by 3G transformation office.")

This plan is binding and tracked weekly by 3G transformation office.

steps.instruction: Build the year 1-3 P&L projection assuming 50% realization of the 100-day plan in year 1 (conservative), 75% by year 2, and 100% by year 3. Model COGS and SG&A improving toward industry benchmarks. Show the margin expansion path and EBITDA growth.
steps.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# Base year and assumptions
revenue_base = 800
growth_rate = 0.03  # Conservative 3% organic growth
cogs_pct_base = 0.58
sga_pct_base = 0.30

# Improvement targets (industry benchmarks)
cogs_pct_target = 0.54
sga_pct_target = 0.27

# Realization path: 50% Y1, 75% Y2, 100% Y3
realization = [0.50, 0.75, 1.0]

# Build 3-year model
years = [1, 2, 3]
model = pd.DataFrame(index=years)

for i, year in enumerate(years):
    model.loc[year, 'Revenue'] = revenue_base * ((1 + growth_rate) ** year)
    
    # Linear interpolation toward target (adjusted for realization %)
    gap_to_close = (cogs_pct_base - cogs_pct_target) * realization[i]
    cogs_pct = cogs_pct_base - gap_to_close
    model.loc[year, 'COGS_Pct'] = cogs_pct
    model.loc[year, 'COGS'] = model.loc[year, 'Revenue'] * cogs_pct
    
    gap_to_close_sga = (sga_pct_base - sga_pct_target) * realization[i]
    sga_pct = sga_pct_base - gap_to_close_sga
    model.loc[year, 'SGA_Pct'] = sga_pct
    model.loc[year, 'SGA'] = model.loc[year, 'Revenue'] * sga_pct
    
    model.loc[year, 'Gross_Profit'] = model.loc[year, 'Revenue'] - model.loc[year, 'COGS']
    model.loc[year, 'EBITDA'] = model.loc[year, 'Gross_Profit'] - model.loc[year, 'SGA']
    model.loc[year, 'EBITDA_Margin_Pct'] = model.loc[year, 'EBITDA'] / model.loc[year, 'Revenue']

# Add baseline year
model.loc[0, 'Revenue'] = revenue_base
model.loc[0, 'COGS_Pct'] = cogs_pct_base
model.loc[0, 'COGS'] = revenue_base * cogs_pct_base
model.loc[0, 'SGA_Pct'] = sga_pct_base
model.loc[0, 'SGA'] = revenue_base * sga_pct_base
model.loc[0, 'EBITDA'] = 96
model.loc[0, 'EBITDA_Margin_Pct'] = 0.12

model = model.sort_index()

print("3-YEAR OPERATIONAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTION")
print("="*80)
print("\nP&L PROJECTION:")
print(model[['Revenue', 'COGS', 'SGA', 'EBITDA', 'EBITDA_Margin_Pct']].round(1))

print("\n" + "="*80)
print("OPERATIONAL METRICS:")
print(model[['COGS_Pct', 'SGA_Pct', 'EBITDA_Margin_Pct']].round(3))

print("\n" + "="*80)
print("MARGIN IMPROVEMENT TRAJECTORY:")
for year in [0, 1, 2, 3]:
    margin_pct = model.loc[year, 'EBITDA_Margin_Pct']
    margin_vs_target = (margin_pct - 0.19) * 100
    print(f"  Year {year}: {margin_pct:.1%} (Gap to 19% target: {margin_vs_target:.0f} bps)")

print("\n" + "="*80)
print("VALUE CREATION SUMMARY:")
print(f"  Current EBITDA: $96M")
print(f"  Year 3 EBITDA: ${model.loc[3, 'EBITDA']:.0f}M")
print(f"  EBITDA growth: ${model.loc[3, 'EBITDA'] - 96:.0f}M (+{(model.loc[3, 'EBITDA']/96 - 1):.0%})")
print(f"\n  Assuming 10x exit multiple:")
print(f"  Current EV: ${96 * 10:.0f}M")
print(f"  Year 3 EV: ${model.loc[3, 'EBITDA'] * 10:.0f}M")
print(f"  EV uplift: ${(model.loc[3, 'EBITDA'] - 96) * 10:.0f}M")
